column1: I need _______ of lemon to put it in my tea. (тонкий ломтик)
Tom eats the last ______ of bread. (тонкий кусочек)
There is ______ milk in the fridge. Can you buy some?
This boy isn't very popular at school. He's got very _______ friends.
Robert ____ coffee for breakfast the day before yesterday.
My friend always ________ TV at seven o'clock.
My father usually ________ to the stadium on Sundays
